location.name: Art appraisers in Hartford, Connecticut

With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Dulack Appraisals of Fine and Decorative Arts LLC
listedAppraisers.description: Veronique Dulack has almost 30 years of appraisal experience. Her expertise covers a wide range of subjects including American and European Fine and Decorative Arts from the 16th to the 20th century.

listedAppraisers.name: Edward C Kitson - ISA AM
listedAppraisers.description: Edward C Kitson is an ISA Accredited Member specializing in antiques, furnishings, and decorative arts, serving the Hartford and coastal New England area.

listedAppraisers.name: Always Buying Antiques and Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Always Buying Antiques and Appraisals provides consultation and appraisal services in Hartford, CT, including appraisals for insurance, estate liquidation, divorce, damage, IRS donation, and family distribution purposes.

listedAppraisers.name: Constitution State Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Constitution State Art Appraisals provides expert fine art and Connecticut regional art appraisals for collectors, galleries, and institutions throughout the Hartford area.

listedAppraisers.name: Connecticut River Valley Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Connecticut River Valley Appraisals has served the Hartford area for over 18 years, providing comprehensive appraisals for fine art, antiques, and American furniture.

listedAppraisers.name: Charter Oak Art Advisors
listedAppraisers.description: Charter Oak Art Advisors provides fine art appraisals and advisory services to collectors and institutions throughout the Hartford metropolitan area.
